title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform stability and fixing critical issues that were preventing some automations from running properly. Key improvements include better Salesforce deployment handling, restored HubSpot functionality, and enhanced data validation to catch common configuration mistakes before they cause problems.

entries.headline: Restored missing historical data from previous weeks
Platform updates now include latest marketplace features
Better Salesforce deployment validation and error handling
details: OpsPal now detects common State/Country picklist configuration issues before deployment
Improved permission checking during Salesforce deployments
Enhanced retry logic for failed deployment steps

entries.headline: Salesforce multi-step deployments now run more reliably
Restored HubSpot automation functionality
details: Fixed critical issue that was preventing HubSpot automations from starting

entries.headline: Salesforce query validation runs without errors
